title: Human Fibroblast Interferon: Amino Acid Analysis and Amino Terminal Amino Acid Sequence
author_string: Knight, E., Hunkapiller, M. W., Korant, B. D., Hardy, R. W., Hood, L. E.
publisher: American Association for the Advancement of Science (AAAS)
abstract: The purification of human fibroblast interferon has been simplified to a two-step procedure consisting of affinity chromatography on Blue Sepharose and sodium dodecyl sulfate polyacrylamide gel electrophoresis. A preliminary amino acid composition and the sequence of the 13 amino-terminal residues of homogeneous interferon prepared by this method is reported.
